team_name: TenderLens: Explainable AI Platform for Government Tender Evaluation
summary: Design a technical platform that automates tender eligibility evaluation for government procurement using four AI agents. The system can handle scanned documents, produces explainable verdicts with source citations, and ensures an audit trail.
optimization_claims: Never silently disqualifies a bidder — all ambiguous cases go to human review
Full audit trail: every verdict links to exact document, page, and extracted value
constraints_addressed: Handles scanned documents and photographs, not just digital PDFs
